message:
feat(engine): kernel synthesis contract CLI binary and regression tests

New binary:
- franken_kernel_synthesis_contract: standalone CLI for running the
  kernel synthesis evidence pipeline — mines canonical kernels from the
  corpus, builds synthesis envelopes, and produces structured evidence
  manifests with run manifests, eligibility reports, trace IDs, and
  repro-lock bundles for deterministic replay

Regression tests:
- test_audit_bypass: verify ambient authority auditor correctly handles
  audit bypass edge cases
- test_sqrt_bug: regression test for integer_sqrt_i128 overflow fix
  (the (x+1)/2 → (x/2)+(x%2) change from the prior commit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
